test_cases.name: corporate-linkedin-empty-buzzwords
test_cases.note: Draft is pure buzzword with no concrete claim; skill correctly strips the tells and flags that nothing load-bearing remains rather than fabricating substance.

test_cases.name: podcast-show-notes
test_cases.note: Removes 'dive deep', 'vibrant world', 'game-changing', 'must-listen'; uses placeholders for guest specifics instead of inventing them.

test_cases.name: minimal-input-refusal
test_cases.note: On a near-empty input the skill names the banned terms and asks for the underlying claim rather than fabricating finished copy — desired professional behaviour.
